name: @agentsandswarms/skills-loader
description: Skills Loader CLI installer + thin client. One command (npx @agentsandswarms/skills-loader install) to connect any MCP-compatible IDE — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Continue.dev — to the hosted Skills Loader
